g.text: Open Researcher is a Python CLI framework that adds an AI-driven research loop to any git repository. It
workspace, lets one or more coding agents analyze the repo, define evaluation metrics,
run iterative experiments, and record keep/discard/crash outcomes in a reproducible log (
("correct/right"), which best maps to improving correctness and reliability for the
: Typer CLI entrypoint and subcommand wiring.
templates, helper scripts, and coordination files.
: single-agent and dual-agent orchestration, log streaming, crash/phase
: Textual dashboard (overview, ideas, charts, logs, docs) and review screen.
: parallel experiment workers, GPU allocation, git
: file-lock-safe shared state and atomic JSON/text
